name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What pain point or limitation are you running into? Real example welcome.

## Proposed solution

How should ZO behave instead?

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you think about, and why aren't they sufficient?

## Scope

Which parts of ZO would this touch? (orchestrator, agents, CLI, plan schema, docs, ...)

## Additional context

Links to related plans, agents, specs, or PRIORS entries.
